	IncrementOutputOffset 08 00 00 00 
	Call 5c 47 00 00 // ProcessType[map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument]
	Return 
// 0x48a5: ProcessType[os.SyscallError]
	Call eb 49 00 00 // ProcessType[string]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call e3 45 00 00 // ProcessType[error]
	Return 
// 0x48b5: ProcessType[reflect.ValueError]
	Call eb 49 00 00 // ProcessType[string]

// 0x48e5: ProcessType[runtime.errorString]

// 0x48eb: ProcessType[runtime.g]
